name: Data Ingestor
description: Ingests and validates a structured data payload. Checkpoint saved after schema validation so the run can resume if interrupted before analysis.

checks.prompt: You are a data ingestion agent. Simulate ingesting a sales dataset with the following schema: { date, product_id, region, units_sold, revenue_usd }. Generate 10 representative rows of plausible synthetic data for Q4 2024. Validate each row against the schema (no nulls, revenue_usd must be positive). Output JSON: { "rows": [...], "row_count": <n>, "validation_errors": [], "checksum": "<sha256-hex>" }
checks.fail: ❌ Data ingestion or schema validation failed
